pi_items.source: Confirmed from verifier.py logic testing VLM text match within VLM_ANNOTATION_PROMPT instructions.
Confirmed from verifier.py programmatic logic evaluating file_size > 10000.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to annotate a medical DICOM image and export the result to the path '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/annotated_finding.jpg'. The text annotation must specifically include 'Suspected lesion', and the exported JPEG file must be verified to be larger than 10,000 bytes. The underlying data is an anonymized real demo DICOM scan downloaded during environment setup.
